scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/api && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=packages/shared && npm run test --workspace=apps/api && npm run test --workspace=apps/web
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage --workspace=packages/shared && npm run test:coverage --workspace=apps/api && npm run test:coverage --workspace=apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace=apps/api && npm run typecheck --workspace=apps/web
